questions.question: What is the primary benefit of using electronic resources over traditional print materials in terms of sustainability?
Describe the main characteristics of e-waste and its impact on the environment.
questions.hint: The accumulation of toxic materials in landfills and oceans

questions.question: What is the role of the circular economy in reducing e-waste and promoting sustainability?
questions.hint: The design of products and systems to be restorative and regenerative by design
